parameters.sqlquery:
"SELECT tissue, COUNT(*) AS significant_gene_count
FROM deseq
WHERE comparison_type = 'bad_vs_control'
  AND ABS(CAST(log2FoldChange AS REAL)) > 0.5
  AND CAST(baseMean AS REAL) > 10
  AND (DEG_max != '-' OR DEG_median != '-')
GROUP BY tissue
ORDER BY significant_gene_count DESC;"
